title: fix: route suno model to generateSunoMusic in GET /audio/:text
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Suno sings again
gist.blurb: Fixed a little mix-up where asking for Suno music via our GET endpoint gave you spoken text instead. The band is back together and ready to play your prompts.
gist.summary: Fixed a routing bug in the GET `/audio/:text` endpoint that caused `model=suno` requests to incorrectly fall back to text-to-speech instead of generating music.
gist.impact: Users can now successfully generate Suno music using simple GET requests without it defaulting to spoken audio.
gist.visual_concept: The PR fixes an audio routing issue where music requests were turning into speech. Visual metaphor: Polly the bee fixing a retro audio device (like a boombox or DJ deck) so it plays music again. Musical notes floating in the air to signify the fix.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny retro headphones, happily fixing a chunky 8-bit boombox that is emitting glowing musical notes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
